Sanjineer for Android

💡 Use one of these free methods to convert to Android APK

1. PWABuilder ⭐ Easiest

Host HTML on GitHub Pages, paste URL on PWABuilder.com

2. Install as PWA ⚡ Instant

Android Chrome: tap ⋮ → "Add to Home Screen"

🔑 Login

Need help? DM @Sanjineer on Instagram

ℹ️ Admin Login — Cloud Access

☁️

Login to access Cloud Backup, Sync & Viewer management

💳

Active ₹30/month subscription required

👁️

Viewers use a shared link — no login needed for them

📂 Active Project

⚠️ Firebase Rules need updating

Firebase Console → Firestore → Rules → paste this:

rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /admins/{uid} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == uid; } match /viewers/{uid} { allow read: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == uid; allow write: if request.auth != null && exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/admins/$(request.auth.uid)); } match /sites/{siteId} { // Only admin can write allow write: if request.auth != null && exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/admins/$(request.auth.uid)); // Viewers & anonymous can read allow read: if request.auth != null; } } }

ℹ️ How it works

Share this link with clients or team. They can view all permitted data without editing anything.

🔗 Create Viewer Link

Share the generated link — viewer opens it, sees only selected tabs. No login needed. Stays active until you delete it.
